actions.value:
Monero (XMR) is currently not synchronizing quickly with the blockchain due to a sustained botnet attack.

This is not in our control, but we're in conversation with the MyMonero team who are actively working on resolving this - https://twitter.com/MyMonero/status/1724352386481762500


Please do not worry. This is a temporary issue, and your coins are safe!

With some patience, your XMR balance will update and the transaction history will be reflected.


Let us know if you have more questions.

XMR botnet attack, please be patient for block synchronization!
